label: Wrong population
definition: No MDD group and no separable MDD data

label: Wrong exposure
definition: No single 25 mg oral synthetic-psilocybin arm

label: Wrong design
definition: No eligible controlled design for primary/indirect strata

label: Wrong setting
definition: Unsupervised exposure or insufficiently described monitored setting

label: Wrong outcome availability
definition: No arm-level safety data covering at least 24 hours

label: Duplicate/secondary report
definition: No unique eligible data beyond linked primary report

label: Not a study report
definition: Editorial, narrative review, news, or commentary

label: Awaiting classification
definition: Insufficient public information; author/sponsor contact pending
